message:
chore: bump version to 0.1.38 for release

Ships two user-reported correctness fixes:
- #225: fresh DB init leaked pages that sqlite3 integrity_check flagged
  as 'Page N: never used'; now run wal_checkpoint(TRUNCATE) at end of
  apply_schema on fresh bootstrap to reclaim them.
- #226: br update/close reported 'Issue not found' on pre-existing beads
  imported from JSONL because get_issue_from_conn routed through
  fsqlite's prepared-row fast path; now bypasses that path via
  query_with_params.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1,6 +1,6 @@
 [package]
 name = "beads_rust"
-version = "0.1.37"
+version = "0.1.38"
 edition = "2024"
 rust-version = "1.88"
 description = "Agent-first issue tracker (SQLite + JSONL)"
